final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a photorealistic close-up lifestyle photo in Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) product-sharing style.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu mom-sharing aesthetic, photorealistic, natural handheld-feel snapshot, warm and authentic
Composition:
  3:4 vertical frame
  Subject standing sideways in front of a full-length mirror in a children's room
  Camera close enough to clearly show shoulder seam line, side camo panel splice, and shorts inseam length
  Boy's hand lightly tugging the waistband of the swimsuit to demonstrate fit
Subject:
  Same little boy as the reference image — preserve face, build, and skin tone faithfully
  Wearing a two-piece swimsuit: royal blue (宝蓝色) body with camouflage-pattern spliced side panels
  Swimsuit fit demonstration: waistband not digging in, no crotch bunching, high-stretch fabric lying smooth without feeling tight
Scene/backdrop: Clean, tidy children's bedroom; full-length mirror visible; minimal props
Lighting/mood:
  Soft, natural indoor daylight
  Authentic and relaxed, evoking a real parent's candid share — "even chubby kids can wear this, so comfortable"
Color palette: Royal blue as dominant swimsuit color, camo panel accent, neutral warm room tones
Materials/textures: Stretchy swimwear fabric with visible texture; camo print on side panels rendered clearly
Text (verbatim):
Constraints:
  Preserve the boy's appearance from the reference image
  Clearly render: shoulder seam line, side camo splice detail, shorts length proportions
  No Chinese text or any text in the image
Avoid: stiff or overly posed look; tight or ill-fitting appearance; cluttered background; harsh shadows; any on-image text
